title: Learning Web Design
content: Recently, I began learning web design. I wanted to understand how websites are created and improved. My lessons covered topics such as page layout, colors, typography, and user experience. At first, designing pages felt difficult, but practice helped me improve. I created a simple personal website as my first project. Seeing my design appear in a web browser was very satisfying. Learning web design combines creativity and technology, which makes it an interesting and rewarding skill to develop.
